Yardstake handles sales, buyer financing, and project coordination. You focus on what you do best — manufacturing quality ADUs. Get paid via milestone draws, not invoices.

How the Builder Program Works

1. Apply & Get Vetted

Submit your company details below. Our team reviews production capacity, quality standards, and service coverage within 3 business days.

2. Activate & Set Pricing

Once approved, complete the Activation Wizard — accept terms, connect Stripe, set your net pricing, and refer a preferred site GC.

3. Build & Get Paid

Orders route to your Kanban. Snap GPS-tagged milestone photos, unlock draws instantly via Stripe Connect. No invoices, no chasing.

Apply to the Builder Program

Takes about 3 minutes. We'll review and respond within 3 business days.

What Happens Next

1

Team Review

Our partner team reviews your capacity, coverage area, and construction type against current demand.

2

Intro Call

A 15-minute call to walk through the orchestration model, pricing transparency, and your first order flow.

3

Activation Wizard

Once approved, you'll receive a link to the Activation Wizard — accept terms, connect Stripe, set pricing, and go live.

Confirmation email sent to mike@cascadeadu.com
